subcodes.title: Fi Hukmi ‘Ilmi’l-Huruf (musajja'ih)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath revealed Himself through the signs in their very essence, and through the Gates by the upright Alif in their manifestations, and through the heavens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی تجلى على الآیات بانفسها و على الابواب بالالف القآئم فی مظاهرها و على السموات
